---
title: "Track: Clustering"
page-layout: full
---

## When to use this track

Choose this path if your primary goal is **partition structure** (clusters / co-clustering), not just density estimation.

## Path (recommended)

1. [Theory: clustering extension](../advanced/theory/02-clustering-extension.qmd)
2. [ex15 — Tail-aware clustering (weights + covariates)](../examples/ex15-clustering-dpmgpd-weights.html)
3. [ex16 — Bulk-only clustering (parameter links + covariates)](../examples/ex16-clustering-dpm-param.html)

## Outputs to understand

- **Labels**: representative partition (Dahl-style) plus assignment scores.
- **PSM**: posterior similarity matrix for diagnostics and stability.
- **Plots**: use S3 `plot()` on cluster objects rather than constructing ad-hoc visuals.

<!-- cmgpd-footer:start -->
## Prereqs
- Required packages and data for this page are listed in the setup chunks above.

## Outputs
- This page renders model fits, diagnostics, and summary artifacts generated by package APIs.

## Interpretation
- Canonical concept page: [02 Clustering Extension](../advanced/theory/02-clustering-extension.qmd)
- Treat this page as an application/example view and use the canonical page for core definitions.

## Next
- Continue to the linked canonical concept page, then return for implementation-specific details.
<!-- cmgpd-footer:end -->
